title: MiniMax M3第0天发布
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
SemiAnalysis
@SemiAnalysis_
Congrats to @ vllm_project & @ lmsysorg for releasing MiniMax M3 428B on both the CUDA & ROCm stack on day 0! MiniMax M3 includes:
🟠 Block sparse attention which is 9x faster prefill over M2.7
🟠 Day 0 open MXFP8 weights
🟠 and Furthermore @ Inferact released Day-0 EAGLE3 open weight d cited to try out the performance on MiniMax M3!
12:00 AM · Jun 13, 2026 11.7K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 祝贺 @vllm_project 和 @lmsysorg 在 CUDA 和 ROCm 堆栈上于第 0 天发布 MiniMax M3 428B！MiniMax M3 包含： 🟠 块稀疏注意力，预填充比 M2.7 快 9 倍 🟠 第 0 天开放 MXFP8 权重 🟠 此外，@Inferact 发布了第 0 天 EAGLE3 开放权重草稿模型支持 期待尝试 MiniMax M3 的性能！

key_excerpts.text: 祝贺 @vllm_project 和 @lmsysorg 在 CUDA 和 ROCm 堆栈上于第 0 天发布 MiniMax M3 428B！MiniMax M3 包含： 🟠 块稀疏注意力，预填充比 M2.7 快 9 倍 🟠 第 0 天开放 MXFP8 权重 🟠 此外，@Inferact 发布了第 0 天 EAGLE3 开放权重草稿模型支持 期待尝试 MiniMax M3 的性能！
Post Log in Sign up Post SemiAnalysis @SemiAnalysis_ Congrats to @ vllm_project & @ lmsysorg for releasing MiniMax M3 428B on both the CUDA & ROCm stack on day 0!
MiniMax M3 includes: 🟠 Block sparse attention which is 9x faster prefill over M2.
7 🟠 Day 0 open MXFP8 weights 🟠 and Furthermore @ Inferact released Day-0 EAGLE3 open weight d cited to try out the performance on MiniMax M3!
